payload.description: A gentle hello from your own cast. Change the dials below — the three archetypes, the tension, the emotional arc — and the story will reshape itself.

cast.voice_hint: the hot take that lands because it wasn't pitched at anybody
earnest out loud, caring on purpose
surreal aside that somehow nails the vibe

location.notes: the default environment — safe to experiment

lines.speaker: CHAR_A
lines.text: Hi. I'm CHAR_A — the first slot, the one you'll see centre-stage.

lines.speaker: CHAR_B
lines.text: I'm CHAR_B. I stand to CHAR_A's side.

lines.speaker: CHAR_C
lines.text: And I'm CHAR_C. I'm here too. Story's not a story with just two people.

lines.speaker: CHAR_A
lines.text: Right now I'm an Edge core. If you change my archetype, I'll speak differently.

lines.speaker: CHAR_B
lines.text: And our relationship to each other shifts with us. Pick archetypes that contrast and we'll spark.

lines.speaker: CHAR_C
lines.text: Pick ones that echo and we'll settle in together.

lines.speaker: CHAR_B
lines.text: There's a tension dial. Low, medium, high — how hot the scene runs.

lines.speaker: CHAR_C
lines.text: And an arc — rising, falling, rise-then-fall, steady with a spike. That's the shape of the feeling across the beats.

lines.speaker: CHAR_A
lines.text: Move any of them. The story swaps to match.

lines.speaker: CHAR_A
lines.text: That's it. You're the director now.

lines.speaker: CHAR_B
lines.text: Try something. We'll meet you there.

lines.speaker: CHAR_C
lines.text: Don't overthink it. The dials are dials — you can always turn them back.

state.conditioning_notes: Onboarding story. The three cast members are self-aware about being slot A/B/C and explicitly teach the user the dials. Keep warm, low-stakes, inviting.
